name: Chicken Almondine
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Chicken breast, cut into half-inch pieces
3 cups Noodles, cooked, hot, and without added margarine or salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a 10-inch nonstick skillet with cooking spray and place over medium heat.
2. Add chicken, garlic, and black pepper to the skillet. Cook until the chicken is cooked through, about 3-4 minutes. Remove the chicken from the skillet.
3. Add milk and chicken bouillon granules to the pan drippings. Stir well, scraping the sides and bottom of the skillet with a flat spatula.
4. Whisk in flour and blend well into the mixture. Return the cooked chicken to the skillet.
5. Add salt and parsley. Cook until slightly thickened, stirring with a flat spatula for about 3-4 minutes.
6. Toss hot cooked noodles and top with toasted almonds.
